docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Command Reference
docs.text: Welcome to the official command reference for Eye of MAGIC. This guide covers both the in-game Discord moderation commands and the backend console commands used by the bot host.

docs.title: Moderation Commands
docs.text: All standard moderation commands use the mg. prefix and must be run inside Discord by authorized personnel.

docs.title: Ban
docs.text: Bans a user globally across the entire game universe. ```text mg.ban [reason]
